Why Orange Key

The faster path to knowing your numbers

Most people spend weeks talking to lenders before understanding what they can actually afford. Orange Key flips that. Know your numbers first.

⚡

60-second estimate

Four quick questions. Your buying power range instantly. No forms to fill, no waiting, no hard pull.

🎯

Real payment context

We show you principal, taxes, insurance, and HOA together — the real monthly number, not just P&I.

🛡️

No credit impact

Your estimate uses only what you share with us. We never pull your credit without your written permission.

Mortgage Calculator

See your payment before you fall in love

Adjust the numbers and your estimate updates instantly. No forms, no commitment — just the math, right now.

  • ✓Includes property taxes and insurance
  • ✓Shows complete cash-to-close breakdown
  • ✓Works for purchase or refinance
Get my personalized estimate →

Estimates are for informational purposes only and are not a loan approval or commitment to lend. Rates and terms subject to credit approval and change without notice.

The Process

Four steps to knowing your numbers

Takes under a minute. No credit check.

01

Tell us your goal

Buy, refinance, or compare options — tell us what you're trying to accomplish.

02

Share a few details

Price range, credit range, income range. Quick-select — no typing required.

03

See your estimate

Instant buying power, estimated monthly payment, and recommended loan type.

04

Connect when ready

A Harris Capital loan officer will reach out within one business day.

Get my estimate →

By providing your phone number you agree to receive text messages from Orange Key regarding your mortgage inquiry. Reply STOP to opt out at any time. Message and data rates may apply.
Orange Key is a registered trade name of Harris Capital Mortgage Group, LLC dba Orange Key · NMLS# 1918223 · Equal Housing Lender · 455 E Eisenhower Pkwy, Suite 300, Ann Arbor, MI 48108 · 888-441-3930 · Not a commitment to lend.
